docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,062.31 FILED BY JEFFERSON, KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, JENNIFER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2018 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON, KIMBERLY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED FEB-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, JENNIFER
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY JEFFERSON, KIMBERLY MORRIS, JENNIFER
REMARK: PROOF OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RECEIVED AFTER MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON MARCH 26, 2018.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2018 BY PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY. PLAINTIFF KIMBERLY JEFFERSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JENNIFER MORRIS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, JENNIFER
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-02-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 04/23/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON, KIMBERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORRIS, JENNIFER $677.14 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $677.14, COST TO REPAIR ($352.14), CIVIL CODE SECTION 1719 CHECK FEES ($25.00), LOST WAGES (3 DAYS X $100.00/DAY) ($300.00) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
